en: X means unknown, but the world is pretty known.
ko: X는 미지수를 의미하지만 세상은 꽤 알려져 있잖아요. 70억 명의 사람들이 있어요

en: It's 7 billion people. I have 7 stones.
ko: X는 미지수를 의미하지만 세상은 꽤 알려져 있잖아요. 70억 명의 사람들이 있어요

en: 1 billion can save money to fly abroad on holiday every year.
ko: X는 미지수를 의미하지만 세상은 꽤 알려져 있잖아. 70억 명이나 되는데

en: 1 billion can save money to keep a car or buy a car.
ko: X는 미지수를 의미하지만 세상은 꽤 알려져 있잖아. 70억 명이나 되는데

en: And then 3 billion, they save money to be able to buy a bicycle or perhaps a two-wheeler.
And 2 billion, they are busy saving money to buy shoes.
In the future, they will get richer.
And these people will move over here. These people will move over here.
We will have 2 billion more in the world like this.
And the question is whether the rich people over there are prepared to be integrated in a world with 10 billion people.
That was the shortest TED talk ever given.
